ratings.comment: Professor Bartlett is a really great teacher! She is incredibly knowledgeable and clearly cares a lot about her students. My one issue with the class was that the syllabus was constantly changing and sometimes you didn't know which readings were due when. She would ultimately clarify and it was never a big deal. Easy A if you come to class!!!

I got an AB in an easy A class. The ONLY reason for this is I skipped class a lot. Don't be me. The class is very interesting and enjoyable, even for non education majors. There is A LOT of reading she assigns, but I did none of it and I was fine. She summarizes the important points in class. Participate & be invested in class and you'll get an A!
